trial_type.Description: Graphoelement category assigned to the 3 s clip.

segment_id.Description: Original segment identifier in the .mat archive.

source_channel.Description: Original SEEG contact name for this clip.

category_id.Description: Original integer category code from segments.csv.

anatomy.Description: Anatomical label from segments.csv, or n/a.

Levels.2: source code 2; meaning is not specified in the segmented release

sample.Description: Event onset in samples from the start of the run.
